## Use case

What should the agent, CLI, or Obsidian vault be able to do?

## Runtime or workflow

Which environment does this apply to?

- Codex
- Claude Code
- Cursor
- Antigravity
- Shell / cron / custom automation
- Other:

## Example shape

Share a sanitized example of the command, note structure, hook payload, or graph output you would want.

## Privacy check

Please remove private vault paths, company names, transcripts, tokens, and personal notes before posting.
